vars.title: Improve the pricing page meta tags
vars.action: Write an SEO title and meta description that mention pricing and the product category.
vars.page_content: Acme Analytics pricing. Simple self-serve plans for B2B SaaS teams. Free tier, Pro, and Enterprise.

format_spec: A single JSON object with exactly two keys, seo_title and seo_description. seo_title must be <= 60 characters and seo_description <= 160 characters. No markdown.
known_good: {"seo_title": "Acme Analytics Pricing - Plans for SaaS Teams", "seo_description": "Compare Acme Analytics pricing: free, Pro, and Enterprise self-serve product analytics plans built for B2B SaaS teams."}
